question_text: Which of the following describes the frequency of a wave?

options.label: A
options.text: How long it takes one complete wave to pass a point

options.label: B
options.text: The number of complete waves passing a point per second

options.label: C
options.text: How far the wave travels in one second

options.label: D
options.text: The height of the wave from its lowest to highest point

explanation: Frequency is how many waves pass a point in one second, measured in Hertz (Hz). A frequency of 10 Hz means 10 complete waves pass each second.
